name: outlook-attachments-mcp
description: Multi-user remote MCP server for Microsoft Outlook (email, attachments, calendar, contacts) — OAuth with Microsoft Entra ID, deployable anywhere with a Dockerfile

scripts.check: node --check http-server.js && node --check server-factory.js && node --check oauth/index.js && node --check auth/index.js && node --check auth/request-context.js

author: Mario Valney <mariovalney@gmail.com>
